# @riteshh123/walletscore

## Install
npm install @riteshh123/walletscore

## Usage
```js
import { getWalletScore } from "@riteshh123/walletscore";

const data =await getWalletScore(walletAddress);
console.log(data);

## Response Format
{ 
    id: number, 
    address: string, 
    score: number, 
    lastSignature: string, 
    date: string, 
    scoreLabel: string 
}

## Description

Returns a trust score for a given wallet address based on on-chain activity.
